title: lucinaea polysperma
intro: Lucinaea polysperma is a plant species found in the tropical regions of Central and South America, commonly known as the "tropical night blooming jasmine".  The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to calm the nervous system and induce a state of relaxation.  The health benefits of Lucinaea polysperma include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and relieving symptoms of insomnia and restlessness.  Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, often consumed before bedtime to promote a restful night's sleep.
